stocks.impact_theory: Bloom Energy announced an expanded partnership with Oracle to supply up to 2.8 GW of fuel-cell power for AI data centers, addressing critical power shortages for AI infrastructure amid surging demand. Economically, this validates solid oxide fuel cells as a reliable, scalable solution for on-site power, reducing grid dependency. Market psychology shifts to optimism on alt-energy plays in AI boom. Historical parallel: GE's power deals in 2010s. Analogies: Fueling AI like oil fueled industrial revolution; Bloom as 'batteries' for data centers.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Deal catalyzes 14-20% surge; X sentiment positive on AI power theme; web news highlights Oracle's AI ramp-up needs.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20-30% gains on AI power momentum; target $230.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if execution delays; potential 10% pullback.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Competition from solar/batteries, high capex, dilution.

stocks.justification: Major validated deal with hyperscaler, aligns with AI infrastructure megatrend.

stocks.impact_theory: Amazon agreed to acquire Globalstar for $11.6B to bolster Project Kuiper/Leo satellite network against Starlink. Implications: Accelerates Amazon's direct-to-device satcom, spectrum access. Psychology: Acquisition premium sparks M&A frenzy in space tech. Parallels: AT&T-Time Warner deal. Analogies: Amazon buying satellite 'highway' for cloud dominance; like Uber acquiring maps.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Deal premium ~300%; X buzz on AMZN sat war; news confirms expansion.

stocks.impact_theory: FDA granted full approval to Filspari (sparsentan) for FSGS, first-ever therapy for rare kidney disease. Implications: Orphan drug monopoly, peak sales $1B+. Psychology: Biotech rally on FDA win. Parallels: Spinraza approval. Analogies: Key to locked safe; lifeline for underserved patients.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 43% surge; positive X/pharma news; removes accelerated approval risk.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 50%+ on sales ramp; target $65.

stocks.justification: FDA approval solid, but commercial execution key.

stocks.impact_theory: Credo to acquire DustPhotonics for $750M+ to enter silicon photonics for next-gen optical connectivity in AI. Implications: Faster, cheaper data transfer for DCs. Psychology: Optics M&A heats up. Parallels: Broadcom-VMware. Analogies: Photonics as 'fiber optic highways' for AI data.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 19% jump AH; X/tech news on AI optics demand.

stocks.justification: Strategic fit strong, but acquisition risks.

stocks.impact_theory: United CEO pitched merger with American to Trump admins, sparking consolidation talk amid overcapacity. Implications: Cost synergies, higher fares. Psychology: M&A premium hopes. Parallels: Delta-Northwest. Analogies: Airlines merging like telecom giants for scale.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 7% rise; X/airline buzz; regulatory shift under Trump.
